title: Work and Opportunities for Women programme: project profile, Ethical Tea Partnership
body: "The Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme partnered with the Ethical Tea Partnership (ETP), the tea sector’s global membership organisation, to progress systemic change through initiatives focused on gender equality, mitigating the effects of climate change and providing additional sources of food and income. This profile looks at what was delivered and what was achieved. "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
